title: Nelk
extract: Nelk (stylized as NELK), also referred to as the Nelk Boys, is a Canadian–American YouTube channel and entertainment company. Known for their prank videos, vlogs, and their brand Full Send Entertainment, they have also begun promoting right-wing political causes. A Canadian outlet has referred to the group's founders, Kyle Forgeard and Jesse Sebastiani, as "two of the most recognizable personalities for young people in North America". They also have a strong following in the Philippines, Israel, and Brazil.
